patches.hypothesis: The bug occurred due to inconsistent behavior when processing form elements. The method was not properly checking for disabled or unselected checkboxes, and was also not properly handling the absence of a value attribute for a checkbox.
patches.changes: + if (el.attr("type").equalsIgnoreCase("checkbox") && !el.hasAttr("checked")) continue; + if (el.attr("type").equalsIgnoreCase("button")) continue; + if (el.hasAttr("disabled")) continue;
patches.diff: + if (el.attr("type").equalsIgnoreCase("checkbox") && !el.hasAttr("checked")) continue; + if (el.attr("type").equalsIgnoreCase("button")) continue; + if (el.hasAttr("disabled")) continue;
